scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix opencode exec -- tsc --noEmit --jsx preserve --jsxImportSource @opentui/solid --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck opencode/plugins/token-tree-usage.tsx
scripts.check: npm run contract-check && npm run unit-and-script-tests
scripts.check:release: npm --prefix opencode ci && npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm run dependency-audit && npm run installation-smoke
scripts.format: echo 'No formatter configured. Markdown and shell are intentionally plain.'
